title: The Prompts JSON schema
description: Prompts is a specification for defining MCP prompts.

service.title: The target Service for Prompts
service.description: Holds reference information about this Service prompts relate.

name.title: The name of Service these prompts relate to.
name.description: Human readable name of the target Service for prompts.

version.title: The version of API these prompts relate to.
version.description: Human readable version of the target Service for prompts.

prompts.title: The Service prompts.
prompts.description: The prompts are defined with name as key.

title.title: Human readable title of this prompt.

description.title: Human readable long description of this prompt.

arguments.title: Optional arguments for this prompt template.

result.title: This prompt result. Maybe a template reusing ${argument} notation.

name.title: The name of this prompt argument.

title.title: Human readable title of this prompt argument.

description.title: Human readable long description of this prompt argument.

required.title: Whether the argument is required or not.
